name: MHH_Prototype_Equipment
title: MHH Prototype Equipment
author: Bumlebien
description: Adds configurable endgame prototype equipment, power armor, combat and logistics robots, and stationary roboports. Choose between three strength presets (Balanced, Overpowered, Cheaty) to control the power level. Compatible with Space Age, Space Exploration, and Krastorio 2 — recipes and technologies adapt to the installed mods.
